name: Silesia
description: Two horizontal stripes — blue over yellow — the traditional colours of Lower Silesia.
history: The traditional flag of Silesia, a historical region in central Europe (today divided between Poland, Germany and the Czech Republic). The yellow-blue colours derive from the medieval coat of arms of Lower Silesia (a black eagle on yellow). Today used as the regional flag of the Polish Lower Silesian and Silesian Voivodeships, and by Silesian regionalist movements.
